## Summary

<!-- What does this PR change, and why? -->

## Related issue

## Checklist

- [ ] I ran `mix precommit` and it passes (format, Credo, docs, tests).
- [ ] I added or updated tests for the change.
- [ ] If I edited `lib/exoplanet/datetime_parser.ex.exs`, I regenerated
      `lib/exoplanet/datetime_parser.ex` with
      `mix nimble_parsec.compile lib/exoplanet/datetime_parser.ex.exs` and
      committed both files.
- [ ] I updated the `[unreleased]` section of `CHANGELOG.md` for any
      user-visible change.
- [ ] I updated the relevant docs (`README.md`, module docs) if behavior changed.
